sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see the corner decorations more clearly. They're L-shaped gray pieces at the 4 corners of the charcoal frame. Let me try clicking on these corner decorations to see if they do something different.
The corner pieces are:
- Node 33: top-left corner, rows 32-37, cols 32-37
- Node 35: top-right corner, rows 32-37, cols 56-61
- Node 62: bottom-left corner, rows 56-61, cols 32-37
- Node 63: bottom-right corner, rows 56-61, cols 60-61
Let me try clicking on the top-left corner decoration (node 33). The center would be around row 34, col 34.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the whole puzzle. I've been clicking on cells in the top-left panel and the bottom-right panel, but I haven't tried the top-right or bottom-left panels. Let me also think about what the game might be asking me to do.
Looking at the image again:
- Top-left panel: 3x3 grid with blue corners, red edges, center piece
- Top-right panel: 3x3 grid with blue corners, red edges, center piece (different from top-left)
- Bottom-left panel: 3x3 grid with red corners, blue edges, center piece
- Bottom-right panel: 3x3 grid all blue, center piece, inside charcoal frame
The bottom-right panel seems to be the "target" - it's framed and has all blue cells. Maybe the goal is to make the other panels match this configuration by clicking on cells to change their colors.
But so far, clicking hasn't changed the board state. Let me try clicking on the charcoal frame corners since those flash when I click elsewhere.
Actually, let me try a completely different approach. Maybe I need to click on the colored cells in the bottom-right panel (the blue cells) to see if they change. Or maybe I need to click on the black separator lines between cells.
Let me try clicking on the frame corner first.

sections.content:
World model update: The charcoal frame has 4 L-shaped gray corner decorations. Clicking elsewhere on the board makes these corners flash. Need to try clicking on the corners themselves and explore other panels.
Plan: Click on a frame corner decoration to test if it has different behavior.

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 34, 'col': 34}])
</parameter>

</tool_call>
